ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "rating" TEXT /* MPAA rating of the movie */,
  "total_gross" REAL /* Total gross earnings of the movie */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie record was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the movie plot */,
  "released_on" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the movie in minutes */,
  "image_file_name" TEXT /* File name of the movie's image asset */,
  "slug" TEXT /* SEO-friendly slug for the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the movie */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country of origin */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary language of the movie */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie trailer */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDB ID for the movie */,
  "tmdb_id" TEXT /* TMDb ID for the movie */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the movie */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated by the movie */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the movie (e.g., released, in production) */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline or catchphrase of the movie */,
  "homepage" TEXT /* URL to the official movie website */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity score of the movie */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the movie */,
  "vote_average" REAL /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification or rating of the movie (e.g., PG-13, R) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cast_members" (
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast member */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie the cast member is associated with */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cast member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role played by the cast member in the movie */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the character played by the cast member */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the cast member */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of appearance in the credits */,
  "profile_path" TEXT /* URL to the cast member's profile image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cast_members_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie directed by this director */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  "profile_path" TEXT /* URL to the director's profile image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_directors_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who provided the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text provided by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was created */,
  "is_favorite" INTEGER /* Indicates if the movie is a favorite of the user */,
  "watched_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user watched the movie */,
  "spoiler" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review contains spoilers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., subscriber, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "is_staff" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is a staff member */,
  "is_superuser" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is a superuser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)
